name: picomatch-rs
description: Rust-first glob matching library with a napi-rs powered Node-API package.
author: Felix W. Liu

scripts.build: napi build napi --platform --cargo-cwd napi && node tools/sync-native-artifact.js
scripts.build:debug: napi build napi --platform --cargo-cwd napi --profile dev && node tools/sync-native-artifact.js
scripts.test:node: npm run build && npm run mocha -- test/smoke.js
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:node
